featureName: BUG-017-001: DoD scenario fidelity gap (SCN-GA-* across all 6 scopes) + report.md evidence reference gap

executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: inserted 6 ### Test Plan tables (one per scope) into specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/scopes.md, each row referencing concrete test file paths (internal/connector/alerts/alerts_test.go, tests/integration/weather_alerts_test.go, tests/e2e/weather_alerts_e2e_test.go); appended 13 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets (one per SCN-GA-* scenario) with raw `go test` PASS output and source pointers; appended BUG-017-001 cross-reference section to specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/report.md naming all three concrete test files by full relative path. No production code changed.

Underlying behavior tests for all 13 SCN-GA-* scenarios PASS: `go test -count=1 -v -run '...' ./internal/connector/alerts/` exit 0 (23/23 PASS across TestHaversineKm, TestFindNearestLocation, TestKnownMapEviction, TestSync_Deduplication, TestSync_PassesMinMagnitudeToURL, TestClassifyEarthquakeSeverity, TestNormalizeEarthquake_TierAssignment, TestFetchNWSAlerts_ValidResponse, TestFetchNWSAlerts_UserAgentHeader, TestMapNWSSeverity, TestClassifyNWSEventType, TestSync_BothEarthquakeAndWeather, TestSync_PartialFailure_USGSDown_NWSUp, TestSync_TsunamiSource, TestNormalizeTsunamiAlert, TestSync_AirNow_ProducesArtifacts, TestClassifyAQISeverity, TestSync_GDACS_ProximityFiltered, TestClassifyGDACSAlertLevel, TestSync_ExtremeEarthquake_NotifiesAlert, TestMaybeNotify_Moderate_NoNotification, TestTravelLocations_DoubleRadius, TestSync_TravelLocation_ExpandedRadius). Output recorded inline in report.md > Test Evidence.

Traceability guard PASS: `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector` returns RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings) with 13/13 scenarios mapped to DoD, 13 concrete test file references, 13 report evidence references. Pre-fix baseline: silent abort in Scope 01 traceability pass under set -euo pipefail (no Test Plan tables). Mid-fix baseline: RESULT: FAILED (1 failures) for missing tests/e2e/weather_alerts_e2e_test.go reference in report.md. Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence.

Artifact lint PASS for both parent (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector`) and bug folder (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/bugs/BUG-017-001-dod-scenario-fidelity-gap`). git diff --name-only confirms boundary: zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, tests/. All edits confined to specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/scopes.md, specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/report.md, and the bug folder.
